query_normalized: predicting battery degradation from public cycling data with recurrent neural networks materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same biological/physical mechanism (battery degradation/state-of-health) and dependent variable (SOH prediction) using a recurrent neural network architecture (BiLSTM), which is the core methodological component of the user's question, even though the specific data source (CALCE lab data vs. public cycling data) differs.
